scope: Formerly-vendored external/ checkouts that have been retired. Each entry records the original pin, the reason for retirement, the active replacement, and the disposition of the archived tree.

original_pin.purpose_when_pinned: DREAMPlace variant patched for Google circuit_training (cell-timing / RL placement integration).

retirement_reason.successor_search_result: No active successor fork found. esonghori/DREAMPlace is stale (2023-02). zhuhanqing/DREAMPlace branch support_circuit_training is stale (2022-10). GitHub code search for 'DREAMPlace-CT' returns 0 hits.
retirement_reason.consumer_audit: No code path in packages/chip imports or executes against external/DREAMPlace-CT/. Repo-wide grep found two references only: a clone URL in scripts/alphachip/build_dreamplace_from_source.sh (rerouted to limbo018), and a passing comment in scripts/alphachip/pb_to_bookshelf.py (updated).

active_replacement.name: DREAMPlace
active_replacement.rationale: limbo018/DREAMPlace is the canonical active upstream and has absorbed the circuit_training integration paths (PR #93 lineage and successors). At-tip pin already maintained under external/DREAMPlace/pin-manifest.json.

rerouted_callers.change: Replaced clone of esonghori/DREAMPlace#circuit_training with limbo018/DREAMPlace master.
Updated explanatory comment to reference the limbo018 CT bridge instead of the retired esonghori fork.
